text: As I stand here, encased by glass and neon reflections, I sense anticipation. The atmosphere feels curated, almost sacred—a liminal point between sterile functionality and the color-soaked promise of innovation. There is quiet; the hum of electricity and the echo of my steps make me aware of my own presence, inviting introspection. I feel like a witness to the threshold of new ideas, both an outsider and a participant in a dialogue between the present and potential futures.
